text: You find it takes effort to introduce yourself to other people.
You often get so lost in thoughts that you ignore or forget your surroundings.
You try to respond to your emails as soon as possible and cannot stand a messy inbox.
You find it easy to stay relaxed and focused even when there is some pressure.
You do not usually initiate conversations.
You rarely do something just out of sheer curiosity.
You feel superior to other people.
Being organized is more important to you than being adaptable.
You are usually highly motivated and energetic.
Winning a debate matters less to you than making sure no one gets upset.
You often feel as if you have to justify yourself to other people.
Your home and work environments are quite tidy.
You do not mind being at the center of attention.
You consider yourself more practical than creative.
You usually base your decisions on facts rather than feelings.
Your living and working spaces are clean and organized.
You avoid making phone calls.
You often spend time exploring unrealistic and impractical yet intriguing ideas.
You think that everyone's views should be respected regardless of whether they are supported by facts or not.
You prefer to do your chores before allowing yourself to relax.
You enjoy participating in group activities.
You like books and movies that make you come up with your own interpretation of the ending.
Your happiness comes more from helping others accomplish things than your own accomplishments.
You are interested in so many things that you find it difficult to choose what to try next.
You are a relatively reserved and quiet person.
If you had a business, you would find it very difficult to fire loyal but underperforming employees.
You often contemplate the reasons for human existence.
Logic is usually more important than heart when it comes to making important decisions.
You usually prefer just doing what you feel like at any given moment instead of planning a particular daily routine.
You rarely worry about whether you make a good impression on people you meet.
You enjoy experimenting with new and untested approaches.
You prioritize and plan tasks effectively, often completing them well before the deadline.
You are not easily affected by strong emotions.
You have a system for everything you do.
You become bored or lose interest when the discussion gets highly theoretical.
You find it easy to empathize with a person whose experiences are very different from yours.
You usually postpone finalizing decisions for as long as possible.
You rarely second-guess the choices that you have made.
After a long and exhausting week, a lively social event is just what you need.
You enjoy going to art museums.
You often have a hard time understanding other people's feelings.
You like to have a to-do list for each day.
You rarely feel insecure.
You have no difficulties coming up with a personal timetable and sticking to it.
Being right is more important than being cooperative when it comes to teamwork.
You are very intrigued by things labeled as controversial.
You would rather improvise than spend time coming up with a detailed plan.
You are a person of few words.
You often take initiative in social situations.
You prioritize facts over people's feelings when determining a course of action.
You often allow the day to unfold without any schedule at all.
You are still bothered by mistakes that you made a long time ago.
You prefer to completely finish one project before starting another.
You are very good at improvising in difficult situations.
You are very sentimental.
You like to use organizing tools like schedules and lists.
Even a small mistake can cause you to doubt your overall abilities and knowledge.
You feel comfortable just walking up to someone you find interesting and striking up a conversation.
You are not too interested in discussing various interpretations and analyses of creative works.
You are more inclined to follow your head than your heart.
